description_long: This is a mid-tower desktop computer case, primarily constructed from black metal panels with a matte finish. The left side panel is removed, revealing internal components such as a power supply unit labeled '700W', a graphics card, motherboard, cooling fan, and visible cabling. The rear panel features multiple I/O ports, a power socket, ventilation grilles, and expansion slots. The case is boxy with sharp edges and a solid, robust appearance, designed to house and protect sensitive electronic components. The top and right side panels are plain, with no visible openings or features. This object is typically found in offices, homes, or tech-related urban environments.
description: A black mid-tower desktop computer case with visible internal components and rear I/O ports, designed for housing PC hardware.
description_view_0: The left side is open, showing the internal hardware including the power supply, motherboard, graphics card, and cabling.
description_view_1: The top panel is visible, plain and featureless, showing the solid construction of the case.
description_view_2: The right side panel is shown, solid and unadorned, with a subtle rectangular indentation.
description_view_3: The rear panel displays ventilation grilles, power socket, I/O ports, and expansion slots for connectivity.
